last_refresh_reason: Revalidated after stack no-wallet policy repair, G0 evidence repair, runtime wait-threshold hardening, and fresh public runtime audit.
rule: A judge-facing claim may appear in README, video, deck, or SUBMISSION only when this matrix has a verified row with product and proof evidence.

claims.claim: The demo writes a scoped Memory Will to Walrus before any successor restore is enabled.
claims.user_action: Judge clicks Kill Agent, chooses role and redactions, then clicks Write Memory Will.
claims.visible_result: Walrus pointer certified appears and Open Cold Successor becomes available only after the pointer exists.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: Walrus Publisher HTTP API returns blob id and Sui object id; src/lib/memory-will/walrus.ts stores the pointer in the receipt.
claims.proof_type: Playwright runtime report, Walrus API response, receipt object id
claims.test: Playwright runtime case 'kill write restore receipt' waits for Walrus pointer certified and asserts Scoped restore ready after the write; API proof includes blob id and object id.

claims.claim: A cold successor agent generates role-specific continuation from only the restored Memory Will scopes.
claims.user_action: Judge clicks Open Cold Successor after the Walrus pointer is certified.
claims.visible_result: Successor output appears with live model output hash, inherited memory list, unavailable memory list, and role label.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: .hunter/agent-runs.json records provider_mode live, model, input_hash, output_hash, messages, and tool_calls for the successor run.
claims.proof_type: agent-runs JSON, Playwright runtime report, API response body
claims.test: Agent run evidence checks provider_mode live and distinct input/output hashes; runtime case waits for Scoped restore complete and successor output hash text.

claims.claim: The receipt can reopen in a second browser context and inspect Walrus/Sui proof.
claims.user_action: Judge opens the receipt from a second browser context and clicks Inspect Proof.
claims.visible_result: Receipt reopened, blob id, role, redactions, replay trace, read status, and Sui object field are visible.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: src/app/api/memory-wills/[willId]/route.ts reads the saved receipt and src/app/api/proof/[willId]/route.ts reads Walrus plus Sui object metadata.
claims.proof_type: Playwright runtime report, Sui JSON-RPC object read, receipt record
claims.test: Runtime case 'receipt reopen second context' uses a second browser context, asserts Memory Will Receipt, clicks Inspect Proof, and asserts Sui object text.
claims.submission_field: Live URL instructions and proof path

claims.claim: Missing durable pointer or missing receipt is a no-success state, not a successful handoff.
claims.user_action: Judge opens a missing receipt URL.
claims.visible_result: No-success banner appears with the missing receipt message and Start New Run recovery action.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: API returns 404 or 424 instead of a success receipt when Walrus pointer or receipt is absent.
claims.proof_type: Playwright runtime report and API status
claims.test: Runtime case 'negative missing receipt recovery' asserts No-success and Memory Will receipt not found, then verifies Start New Run returns to Checkpoint live.
